lines.speaker: Monkey Archer
lines.text: After years of planning, the humans are going to get what they deserve.

lines.speaker: Monkey Archer
lines.text: Hmm, I don't think this is quite right.

lines.speaker: Monkey Archer
lines.text: I wish Kruk would do his own dirty work.

lines.speaker: Monkey Archer
lines.text: This looks like a good spot.

lines.speaker: Monkey Archer
lines.text: The time of monkeys is almost upon us.

lines.speaker: Monkey Archer
lines.text: You! Get out of my way!
